milestones.title: Broadway Subway Opens
milestones.description: Millennium Line extension to Arbutus Street — 6 new stations

milestones.title: R2 RapidBus Extension to Metrotown
milestones.description: Extend R2 Marine Drive from River District to Metrotown Station

milestones.title: Stanley Park Bus Route
milestones.description: New seasonal shuttle service to Stanley Park funded in 2025 Investment Plan

milestones.title: Bus Network Integration (Broadway)
milestones.description: Restructure local buses to connect with new Broadway Subway stations

milestones.title: South Vancouver Bus Changes
milestones.description: Route modifications in south Vancouver including changes to routes 8, 20, 26, 29, 31

milestones.title: Burnaby Mountain Gondola
milestones.description: Aerial gondola from SkyTrain to SFU campus — replaces bus route 143

milestones.title: Millennium Line UBC Extension
milestones.description: SkyTrain extension from Arbutus to UBC campus

milestones.title: North Shore Bus Improvements
milestones.description: New routes H and I; changes to 209, 210, 211, 214, 257 serving North Vancouver

milestones.title: Transit Priority Infrastructure
milestones.description: 31 priority corridors in 3 tiers for bus lanes, signal priority, queue jumps

milestones.title: Downtown Bus Restructure
milestones.description: Reorganize downtown bus routing pending new exchanges at Stadium-Chinatown and Waterfront

phases.label: Near-Term (2026–2028)
phases.description: Changes funded by 2025 Investment Plan or implementable with existing resources

phases.label: Medium-Term (2028–2032)
phases.description: Requires additional funding through future Investment Plans
